_meta.author: ruixen.ui
_meta.title: Hover Preview Button
_meta.description: The HoverPreviewButton component is a versatile and interactive button built entirely with shadcn UI. When hovered, it reveals a small preview popup that can display images, charts, text, or any custom content, providing users with a quick glance at additional information without leaving the page. The preview is dynamically positioned below the button and centered, ensuring a clean and intuitive interface. Fully responsive and theme-independent, this component is ideal for actions like “View Report,” image previews, or mini dashboards, enhancing user experience with an elegant, lightweight, and highly reusable design.
